grammar. Fortunately, most article mistakes do not matter too much. Even if we The  correct use of the articles is one of the most difficult points in English 3  How   much     do   articles      matter?

are known both to the speaker/writer and listener/hearer ('definite'), Articles can show whether we  are talking about identifiable things, which 2 What    are   articles      used    for?

belong to a group of words called 'determiners'.

There are two: the (the definite article) and a/an (the indefinite article). They Articles are small words that are often used at the beginning of noun phrases.

1  What    are   articles?

133 articles:     introduction grammar •  135  articles: basic information (B) not Our  garden needs water, (     ... a water.)               -> not Jack collects stamps, (     .. .-a stamps.) •   Don't use a/an with plural or uncountable nouns.

2 four    common       mistakes       to  avoid She's afraid of rats. I need help.

-  put no article with a plural or uncountable noun.

There’s a rat in the kitchen! I need an envelope.

-  put a/an before a singular countable noun (►   137).

•    When  we  can't say 'You know which  I mean', we: Could you pass the salt? (You can see the salt that I want.) Have you fed the dogs? (You know which  ones I mean.) I've been to the doctor. (You know which  one: my  doctor.) •    To  say 'You know which  I mean', we  put the before a noun.
